summary: Dashboard Results Tab testing completed. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all components: 3 KPI cards (Émissions totales, Émissions/kCHF, Variation N-1), Émissions par Scope chart with drill-down tooltip, Top 10 sous-catégories list with colored bars, and Évolution des émissions stacked bar chart. Tab navigation between Suivi de saisie, Résultats, and Objectifs working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Drill-down click interaction difficult to trigger via Playwright automation (SVG element interception). Tooltip shows 'Cliquez pour voir les catégories' indicating functionality is implemented. Manual testing recommended to verify drill-down works.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Results Tab fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_dashboard_results.py cover all 4 dashboard APIs. Frontend verified: 3 KPI cards display correct data from /api/dashboard/kpis, Scope chart uses /api/dashboard/scope-breakdown, Top 10 list derived from scope breakdown categories, Evolution chart uses /api/dashboard/fiscal-comparison. Drill-down tooltip visible but click interaction via Playwright has SVG interception issues - recommend manual verification.

emissions_par_scope.details: Bar chart showing Scope 1 (34.3t), Scope 2, Scope 3 with drill-down tooltip

top_10_sous_categories.details: List showing combustion_mobile (33.9), combustion_fixe (0.5), utilisation_produits (0.1), etc.

evolution_des_emissions.details: Stacked bar chart showing emissions by fiscal year (2024-2029) with Scope 1, 2, 3 segments

dashboard_summary.GET /api/dashboard/summary: 200 OK - Returns total_emissions, scope_emissions, scope_completion, activities_count

dashboard_kpis.GET /api/dashboard/kpis: 200 OK - Returns current_emissions, emissions_per_revenue, year_over_year_change, fiscal year info

dashboard_fiscal_comparison.GET /api/dashboard/fiscal-comparison: 200 OK - Returns list of fiscal years with scope1, scope2, scope3_amont, scope3_aval emissions

dashboard_scope_breakdown.GET /api/dashboard/scope-breakdown/curre: 200 OK - Returns scopes with total and categories for drill-down
dashboard_scope_breakdown.GET /api/dashboard/scope-breakdown/{fisc: 200 OK - Returns scope breakdown for specific fiscal year
